# `api.jobs.on_hold.update_dates`

> `PUT /job/{jobDisplayId}/onhold/{onHoldId}/dates` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.on_hold.update_dates(job_display_id: int, on_hold_id: str, *, data: SaveOnHoldDatesModel | dict) -> None
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs on_hold update_dates <job_display_id> <on_hold_id> [--data ...]
```

Update follow-up / due dates on an on-hold record.

Request model: :class:`SaveOnHoldDatesModel`.

## Request body — `SaveOnHoldDatesModel`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `followUpDate` | `Optional[str]` | no | Follow-up date |
| `dueDate` | `Optional[str]` | no | Due date |

## Response

No response body.
